feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Love and Protect
entry.summary:
Author: Timatimmy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,436Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 18

Summary: Merlin flees Ealdor with nothing but a pack on his back and his mother’s desperate instructions: "go to Camelot, hide with Gaius, and keep your head down." With King Cenred hunting for the powerful young warlock born on his borders, the heart of Uther Pendragon's anti-magic kingdom seems like the last place Merlin should be safe.   ​But when an arrogant crown prince risks his life to fetch a cure for a dying servant—guided through the dark by a mysterious, floating orb of blue light—everything changes. Arthur knows Merlin's secret. And instead of execution, Arthur makes a silent, fierce vow: he will protect his clumsy servant, no matter the cost, until he can reshape Camelot into a kingdom safe enough for the man he is secretly falling for.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: O Waly, Waly
entry.summary:
Author: rosy_glass

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,260Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 170

Summary: While hunting for a Griffin terrorizing Camelot, Arthur stumbles upon a beautiful boy injured by the beast in the forest and decides to save him. It is only later that Arthur learns that he is not, as Arthur had believed, a regular boy or a prince, but a rare male dryad named Merlin. As Fate would have it, their paths cross many more times. With each encounter, Arthur's curiosity deepens into something far too warm and tender to acknowledge. Perhaps it is the thrill of meeting a creature of myths with powerful magic, or perhaps it is Merlin's captivating sea blue eyes, but Arthur cannot stay away for long.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,738Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 41

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,137Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin. — “You bring only chaos,” Merlin said. “You’ll never reach that library or that lake.” Arthur laughed and stepped closer. “Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt before anyone?” Merlin’s blue eyes shone in the torchlight, fearless. Instead, he smiled. “No,” he whispered. “But if you want to show me…” Magic stirred beneath his skin. “Then don’t hesitate to try.” And in that moment, only one thing was certain: Someone would kneel. Neither of them yet knew who it would be.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: don't panic
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherRogueSelkie

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,078Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 10

Summary: The Great Plan. Destiny. Fate. Call it what you will, there are certain people it's taken a shine to over the years. Amongst those people, this is generally seen as a Very Bad Thing. Arthur's returned, and while Merlin's delighted about that, he does know what it means. He's been hoping it wasn't going to be for a good long time, though. Things have been nice. They've been settling into life in New York, where Merlin has been working as a forensic pathologist for the NYPD. They've even found community - a bunch of mad vigilante types who remind him, just a little, of the knights. Merlin hasn't felt this part of something in, well, it's been a while. Then he has to go and run into an old friend summoned and then trapped in a circle by bloody amateurs trying to conjure up something to help them with their Daredevil problem. Now it seems the world's ending. Again, apparently. (You don’t need to know all the fandoms, any context needed is obvious in the story. Feel free to ask questions in the comments if there's anything you don't get!)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,079,671Chapters: 134/?Kudos: 1,684

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

entry.title: I Thought You Were Dead
entry.summary:
Author: alkimi

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,498Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Gwen kissed him when he recovered from the poisoned chalice. Merlin had never truly understood why. When Arthur stirs at the Lake of Avalon after Camlann, he finally fathomed it out. This is a slow burn, character arc story that follows Merlin and Arthur's relationship after Camlann.

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 124,039Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 112

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 373,528Chapters: 79/110Kudos: 3,523

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: In the Clearing
entry.summary:
Author: melody_moon

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,647Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 38

Summary: Prince Arthur had seen a lot in his eight summers, the bustle of castle life, the training of new knights, and the bi-annual magical assination attempts against his father. But he's never seen a frog change colour, or a boy with magic that...wasn't evil? Maybe there was more to magic, than what meets the eye...

entry.title: To Be Known
entry.summary:
Author: everydayistuesday

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 63,701Chapters: 10/12Kudos: 540

Summary: Gaius ushers them in. “I was just gathering my things to come check in on you. How are you feeling?” “Uh, headache. Deeply wrong.” And then Merlin adds offhandedly, “Oh, and like I’ve switched bodies with the Crown Prince of Camelot.”   Or: Merlin and Arthur accidentally swap bodies. This would be a great opportunity for Merlin to relish in making Arthur muck out the stables, if the prat hadn't also gotten Merlin's magic in the exchange.

entry.title: The Absolution of the Son
entry.summary:
Author: LadyWhistleClown

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,214Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 86

Summary: Arthur is angry when he learns that he is born of magic and that his Father sacrificed his Mother so he could have an heir. In this version of events, Merlin doesn't tell Arthur that Morgause lied to him. Arthur must confront his Father and face Camelot's history of discriminatory anti-magic policies head on, including his own role in them. All while he feels himself slowly drawn closer and closer to his manservant Merlin. Meanwhile, Merlin must continue to keep his magic secret and work in the shadows for the better future with Arthur he's been promised is his destiny.
